name: SweetBed
short_description: Girls invite you to their world. Play custom mode, become choreographer, chose girl, change her outfit, and the surrounding for the beautiful dancer. Join them and admire their beautiful movements in a dance. Sit comfortably in your armchair, put on VR googles and relax. 《SweetBed》是一款玩家可以选择不同的音乐来进行跳舞的轻度休闲舞蹈游戏。
detailed_description:
Girls invite you to their world. Play custom mode, become choreographer, chose girl,
change her outfit, and the surrounding for the beautiful dancer.
Join them and admire their beautiful movements in a dance.

Sit comfortably in your armchair, put on VR googles and relax.

社群

QQ：1929528415
贴吧：SweetBed

游戏

《sweetbed》是一款玩家可以选择不同的音乐来进行跳舞，也可以选择自己的歌曲来扮演 。

故事

角色的动作越快、越准确，他们赢的越快。如果你的动作有问题，你可以在练习室里练习……

特点

  • 一款轻度休闲舞蹈游戏。

  • 独特的音乐舞蹈设计，贴近你的生活。
    • [/h2]

  • 丰富的游戏体验设计，让你回味无穷。
    • [/h2]

  • 如果跳的好，游戏会大声鼓舞！
    • [/list][/h2]
